evals.prompt: Research the latest best practices for Rust error handling in 2026
evals.expected_output: The agent follows the progressive strategy: analyzes the query, performs searches with 'Rust error handling best practices 2026', prioritizes official docs (blog.rust-lang.org) and expert blogs, synthesizes findings with source links.
assertions: The agent includes the year in search queries
The agent prioritizes official docs first
The agent provides source links with findings
The agent notes any gaps in information

evals.prompt: Find the official documentation for Stripe webhook signature verification
evals.expected_output: The agent searches 'Stripe webhook signature site:stripe.com' or 'Stripe webhook signature official docs', fetches the official Stripe documentation, and provides the relevant code example.
assertions: The agent uses site: operator for official docs
The agent includes the URL to the official docs

evals.prompt: Compare Redis vs Memcached for session caching
evals.expected_output: The agent searches for comparisons, fetches multiple authoritative sources, presents findings organized by criteria (performance, features, complexity), and notes any conflicting information.
assertions: The agent fetches multiple sources for comparison
The agent organizes findings by criteria
The agent notes source quality and any conflicts

evals.prompt: What source priority should I use when researching technical topics?
evals.expected_output: The agent explains the source priority: Official docs (3 stars) fetch first, Expert blogs/SO (2 stars) if needed, Generic tutorials (1 star) skip, AI farms (never).
assertions: The agent lists the source priority tiers
The agent explains why official docs come first
The agent mentions avoiding AI farm content

evals.prompt: My search returned outdated results from 2022. How do I get more current information?
evals.expected_output: The agent suggests: add the current year to the search query, use 'after:' operator, check publication dates, look for changelog updates.
assertions: The agent suggests adding year to search query
The agent mentions the after: operator
The agent recommends checking publication dates
